name: Pad Thai Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Shrimps, raw, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Place noodles in hot (not boiling) water. Let soak for 10 minutes, then drain.
2. In a small bowl, combine fish sauce, tomato sauce, and vinegar. Stir in sugar to dissolve.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or large frying pan over high heat. Cook garlic and chili pepper flakes for 15 seconds.
4. Add pork (or chicken) and shrimp. Stir fry until the meat changes color.
5. Add tofu pieces and the fish sauce mixture to the wok, bring to a boil.
6. Add drained noodles and toss until well coated in the sauce.
7. Transfer noodles to a warm serving platter.
8. In the same wok, add remaining oil; add eggs and cook for 10 seconds. Scramble eggs and add bean sprouts.
9. Return noodles to the wok and stir to mix eggs with noodles. Continue cooking until eggs are set.
10. Arrange noodles on a serving plate and garnish with chopped fresh coriander, coarsely chopped peanuts, minced green onions, and chopped chilies. Serve immediately.
